LanguageData.VOE_DisableIntegrationDesc: Master switch. Turns off ALL integration between Empire Refactored and Vanilla Outposts Expanded.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostDefendedDesc: Your outpost {0} successfully repelled an enemy raid.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostRaidedDesc: Your outpost {0} was raided! {1} colonists were injured and some supplies were lost.
LanguageData.VOE_ChangeDefenderDesc: Select an Empire settlement to defend this outpost.
LanguageData.VOE_DeliveryOutpostDesc: Choose where taxes from this settlement are delivered. Currently: {0}
LanguageData.VOE_FinancingOutpostDesc: Choose an outpost to fund this settlement's payments. Currently: {0}
LanguageData.VOE_TaxRedirectedDesc: The outpost designated to receive taxes from {0} no longer exists. Shipment redirected to {1}.
LanguageData.VOE_InvalidDeliveryOutpost: {0} tried to deliver taxes to an invalid outpost. Delivery destination has been reset.
LanguageData.VOE_FinancingPartiallyDepleted: {0}'s funds are depleted. Remaining {1} silver will be drawn from your coffers.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableMilitaryDesc: Outposts can be raided, defensive outposts auto-defend nearby settlements, and outposts appear in the military tab.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableDefensiveAuraDesc: Garrisoned defensive outposts passively stiffen the defense of nearby settlements when raided, even without deploying their forces.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableDefensiveAuraDivertDesc: Settlements shielded by a nearby defensive outpost become less likely raid targets, shifting enemy attention toward the outposts themselves.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableDeliveryDesc: Route settlement tax deliveries to outposts instead of the player's tax map.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableFinancingDesc: Outposts can fund settlement payments from their stored silver.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableResourceLinkDesc: Production outposts (mining, farming, hunting, logging, drilling, science) can be linked to a nearby settlement to feed its matching resource output instead of shipping physical items.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableEncampmentDesc: Nearby encampments boost the heal rate of mercenaries at your settlements.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableOutpostConversionDesc: Outposts can be converted into Empire settlements via a gizmo. Towns can become any settlement type; production outposts can become their matching specialized type (e.g. a logging outpost becomes a lumber camp) when a submod that adds those types is installed.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableRoadsDesc: The Empire road builder includes your outposts in its network, building roads to and between them alongside settlements.
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertOutpostPawnsDesc: When an outpost is converted, its workers join the new settlement: assigned as specialists/residents with Empire Refactored: Specialists & Governors installed, otherwise converted into skill-based production bonuses.
LanguageData.VOE_EnableConversionDelayDesc: An outpost cannot be converted into a settlement until it has existed for the configured number of days.
LanguageData.VOE_ConversionDelayDays: Days before an outpost can be converted
LanguageData.VOE_RequireOutpostDesc: Empire settlements can no longer be founded directly. Instead, establish an outpost and convert it. On the Found Settlement screen, the Settle button becomes "Send a Caravan".
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertToSettlementDesc: Transform this outpost into an Empire settlement. Its workers join the settlement and the outpost is replaced.
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertPickType: Convert outpost into which settlement type?
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertReady: Can be converted into a settlement
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertNoPawns: This outpost has no workers to form a settlement.
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertBusyPacking: This outpost is being packed up.
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertBusyDefending: This outpost's forces are away defending {0}.
LanguageData.VOE_ConvertInvalidType: This outpost cannot be converted into that settlement type.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostIncorporatedDesc: The outpost {0} has been incorporated into your new settlement {1}. {2} worker(s) have joined the settlement.
LanguageData.VOE_MustFoundViaOutpost: Settlements must be founded by establishing an outpost and converting it.
LanguageData.VOE_SendCaravanNoColony: You need a colony to form a caravan from.
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostRequirementsDesc: To found a {0}, establish and convert one of these outposts:
LanguageData.VOE_OutpostRequirementsNone: No outpost type can become this settlement type. Check that the required submod is installed.
LanguageData.VOE_TownMinTotal: Minimum number of nearby settlements and outposts
LanguageData.VOE_TownRange: Max range to look for settlements or outposts
LanguageData.VOE_TownExcludeTownsDesc: When on, other Town outposts are not counted toward the nearby-outpost requirement.
LanguageData.VOE_TownNearbySettlements: Not enough nearby settlements, need {0} within {1} tiles
LanguageData.VOE_TownNearbyOutposts: Not enough nearby outposts, need {0} within {1} tiles
LanguageData.VOE_TownNearbyTotal: Not enough nearby settlements or outposts, need {0} within {1} tiles
LanguageData.VOE_TownRequirements: Need at least {0} settlements or outposts within {1} tiles, of which at least {2} are settlements and {3} are outposts.
LanguageData.VOE_TownXenoPureDesc: When enabled, this town only recruits new residents matching the xenotype of the recruiting resident (or its race, for non-human residents). In exchange, recruitment happens less often.
LanguageData.VOE_TownXenoPureChanceDesc: Per-town toggle (gizmo on the town's world map). While a town has same-xenotype recruiting on, its recruit chance is scaled by this multiplier.
LanguageData.VOE_MainTabNoSettlements: You have not founded any settlements.
LanguageData.VOE_EncampmentHealRatePerLevel: Heal rate bonus per Medicine level
LanguageData.VOE_CodexFeatureDisabled: This feature is turned off in the mod settings.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexNoSettlements: You have not founded any settlements yet.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexOverviewDisabled: All Empire-Vanilla Outposts Expanded integration is currently disabled in the mod settings.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexOverviewNoOutposts: No outposts have been established yet.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexEncampmentNone: No settlements have an encampment within range.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexDeliveryNone: All settlements deliver their taxes to your tax map.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexFinancingNone: No settlement is financed by an outpost.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexScienceNone: No science outpost is linked to a settlement.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexResourceLinkNone: No production outpost is linked to a settlement.
LanguageData.VOE_CodexConversionNone: You have no outposts that can be converted into a settlement.
